scripts.prestart: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'fs'; if (!fs.existsSync('dist/index.html')) { console.error('Run npm run build before npm start'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.postbuild: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'fs'; fs.accessSync('dist/index.html'); console.log('dist/ ready');"
